data.name: Common.DatabaseConflict
data.value: The record already exists in the system.

data.name: Common.OperationCancelled
data.value: The operation was cancelled.

data.name: Common.PageNumberInvalid
data.value: Page number must be greater than 0.

data.name: Common.PageSizeInvalid
data.value: Page size must be greater than 0.

data.name: Common.PageSizeTooLarge
data.value: Page size cannot exceed 100.

data.name: Common.IdMismatch
data.value: ID in URL does not match ID in body.

data.name: Common.Unauthorized
data.value: You are not authorized to perform this action.

data.name: Common.NoPermission
data.value: You do not have permission to perform this action

data.name: Password.MinLength
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

data.name: Password.RequireUppercase
data.value: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.

data.name: Password.RequireLowercase
data.value: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.

data.name: Password.RequireDigit
data.value: Password must contain at least one digit.

data.name: Password.RequireSpecial
data.value: Password must contain at least one special character.

data.name: ResetPassword.ReasonRequired
data.value: Password reset reason is required.

data.name: ResetPassword.ReasonMinLength
data.value: Reason must be at least 10 characters long.

data.name: ResetPassword.ReasonMaxLength
data.value: Reason cannot exceed 500 characters.

data.name: Auth.InvalidCredentials
data.value: Invalid email or password.

data.name: Auth.AccountInactive
data.value: Account is currently locked or inactive.

data.name: Auth.AccountBlocked
data.value: Account temporarily blocked due to too many failed attempts. Please try again later.

data.name: Auth.InvalidToken
data.value: Invalid or expired token.

data.name: Auth.RefreshTokenNotFound
data.value: Refresh token not found.

data.name: Auth.RefreshTokenExpired
data.value: Refresh token has expired.

data.name: Auth.RefreshTokenRevoked
data.value: Refresh token has been revoked.

data.name: Auth.AccountCreationEmailFailed
data.value: Account creation failed: Unable to send notification email. Please check the email address.

data.name: Auth.ResetRequestLimit
data.value: Too many password reset requests. Please try again later.

data.name: Auth.InvalidResetLink
data.value: The reset link is invalid or has expired.

data.name: Auth.UserNotLoggedIn
data.value: User is not logged in.

data.name: Auth.InvalidAction
data.value: Invalid action.

data.name: Auth.TooManyAttempts
data.value: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

data.name: Password.ConfirmationMismatch
data.value: Password confirmation does not match.

data.name: Password.MustBeDifferent
data.value: New password must be different from current password.

data.name: Password.IncorrectCurrent
data.value: Current password is incorrect.

data.name: Profile.PhoneExists
data.value: Phone number is already in use by another user.

data.name: Profile.EmailExists
data.value: Email is already in use by another user.

data.name: Enterprise.NotFound
data.value: No enterprise information found.

data.name: InternshipGroup.NameRequired
data.value: Internship group name is required.

data.name: InternshipGroup.NameMaxLength
data.value: Internship group name cannot exceed 255 characters.

data.name: InternshipGroup.TermIdRequired
data.value: Term ID is required.

data.name: InternshipGroup.StartDateBeforeEndDate
data.value: Start date must be before end date.

data.name: InternshipGroup.StudentListRequired
data.value: Student list is required.

data.name: InternshipGroup.StudentListToRemoveRequired
data.value: List of students to remove is required.

data.name: Projects.LogDeleteError
data.value: Error deleting project {0}

data.name: ProjectResources.ProjectIdRequired
data.value: Project Resource ID is required

data.name: ProjectResources.ResourceNameMaxLength
data.value: Resource name cannot exceed 500 characters

data.name: Projects.ProjectIdRequired
data.value: Project ID is required

data.name: ProjectResources.LogNotFound
data.value: Project resource with ID {0} not found

data.name: ProjectResources.NotFound
data.value: Project Resource Not Found

data.name: Projects.LogNotFound
data.value: Project with ID {0} not found

data.name: Projects.NotFound
data.value: Project Not Found

data.name: ProjectResources.LogUpdateError
data.value: Error occurred while updating project resource with ID {0}

data.name: ProjectResources.UpdateError
data.value: An error occurred while updating the project resource.

data.name: ProjectResources.LogUploadError
data.value: Error uploading file to project {0}

data.name: ProjectResources.FileRequired
data.value: File is required

data.name: ProjectResources.InvalidFileType
data.value: Invalid file type. Allowed types: {0}

data.name: ProjectResources.FileSizeExceeded
data.value: File size exceeds maximum allowed

data.name: ProjectResources.GetAllError
data.value: Error getting all project resources

data.name: ProjectResources.GetByIdError
data.value: Error getting project resource by ID: {0}

data.name: Projects.ProjectNameExistsInternship
data.value: Project name already exists for this internship

data.name: Projects.LogCreateError
data.value: Error creating project for internship {0}

data.name: Projects.InternshipIdRequired
data.value: Internship ID is required.

data.name: Projects.ProjectNameRequired
data.value: Project name is required.

data.name: Projects.ProjectNameMaxLength
data.value: Project name cannot exceed 255 characters

data.name: Projects.DescriptionMaxLength
data.value: Description cannot exceed 2000 characters

data.name: Projects.StartDateInvalidRange
data.value: Start date must be less than or equal to end date

data.name: Projects.EndDateInvalidRange
data.value: End date must be greater than or equal to start date

data.name: Projects.UpdateError
data.value: Error updating project {0}

data.name: Projects.GetAllError
data.value: Error getting all projects

data.name: Projects.GetByStudentIdError
data.value: Error getting projects for student {0}

data.name: Epic.ProjectIdRequired
data.value: Project ID is required.

data.name: Epic.NameRequired
data.value: Epic name is required.

data.name: Epic.NameMaxLength
data.value: Epic name must not exceed 255 characters.

data.name: Epic.DescriptionMaxLength
data.value: Description must not exceed 2000 characters.

data.name: Epic.NotFound
data.value: Epic not found.

data.name: Epic.CannotDeleteWithChildren
data.value: Cannot delete Epic with existing children. Please remove or reassign all children first.

data.name: Epic.ProjectNotFound
data.value: Project not found.

data.name: Stakeholder.NotFound
data.value: Stakeholder not found.

data.name: Stakeholder.ProjectNotFound
data.value: Project not found.

data.name: Stakeholder.EmailExists
data.value: Email already exists in this project.

data.name: Stakeholder.IdRequired
data.value: Stakeholder ID is required.

data.name: Stakeholder.ProjectIdRequired
data.value: Project ID is required.

data.name: Stakeholder.NameRequired
data.value: Name is required.

data.name: Stakeholder.NameMaxLength
data.value: Name cannot exceed 200 characters.

data.name: Stakeholder.EmailRequired
data.value: Email is required.

data.name: Stakeholder.EmailInvalid
data.value: Email format is invalid.

data.name: Stakeholder.EmailMaxLength
data.value: Email cannot exceed 150 characters.

data.name: Stakeholder.RoleMaxLength
data.value: Role cannot exceed 100 characters.

data.name: Stakeholder.DescriptionMaxLength
data.value: Description cannot exceed 500 characters.

data.name: Stakeholder.PhoneNumberInvalid
data.value: Phone number is invalid. Please enter a valid phone number format.

data.name: Stakeholder.PhoneNumberMaxLength
data.value: Phone number cannot exceed 15 characters.

data.name: Stakeholder.CreateSuccess
data.value: Stakeholder created successfully.

data.name: Stakeholder.UpdateSuccess
data.value: Stakeholder updated successfully.

data.name: Stakeholder.DeleteSuccess
data.value: Stakeholder deleted successfully.

data.name: Issue.NotFound
data.value: Issue not found.

data.name: Issue.StakeholderNotFound
data.value: Stakeholder not found.

data.name: Issue.TitleRequired
data.value: Title is required.

data.name: Issue.DescriptionRequired
data.value: Description is required.

data.name: Issue.StakeholderIdRequired
data.value: Stakeholder ID is required.

data.name: Issue.InvalidStatus
data.value: Invalid status. Please select: Open, InProgress, Resolved, or Closed.

data.name: Issue.CreateFailed
data.value: Failed to create issue.

data.name: Issue.UpdateFailed
data.value: Failed to update issue.

data.name: Issue.DeleteFailed
data.value: Failed to delete issue.

data.name: Projects.LogGetByIdError
data.value: Error when get project ID : {0}

data.name: Projects.LogGetByInternshipIdErr
data.value: Error when get project by internship ID: {0}

data.name: Internships.NotFound
data.value: No internship found with ID: {0}

data.name: StudentTerms.TermIdRequired
data.value: Please select a term before performing this action.

data.name: StudentTerms.StudentTermIdRequired
data.value: The enrollment record could not be identified. Please reload the page and try again.

data.name: StudentTerms.StudentTermIdListRequired
data.value: Please select at least one student to perform this action.

data.name: StudentTerms.StudentTermIdListMinCount
data.value: At least 1 student must be selected.

data.name: StudentTerms.ValidRecordsRequired
data.value: No valid data found to import. Please check the file and try again.

data.name: StudentTerms.ValidRecordsMinCount
data.value: No valid rows found in the file. Please fix all errors in the file before importing.

data.name: StudentTerms.FileRequired
data.value: Please select a file to upload.

data.name: StudentTerms.FileEmpty
data.value: The uploaded file has no content. Please verify and select the correct file.

data.name: StudentTerms.FullNameRequired
data.value: Full name is required.

data.name: StudentTerms.FullNameInvalid
data.value: Full name is invalid. Only letters and spaces are allowed — no numbers or special characters.

data.name: StudentTerms.StudentCodeRequired
data.value: Student code is required.

data.name: StudentTerms.StudentCodeInvalid
data.value: Student code is invalid. Only lowercase letters (a-z), digits (0-9), and the characters -, _, . are allowed.

data.name: StudentTerms.StudentCodeInvalidDetail
data.value: Student code is invalid (only a-z, 0-9, -, _, . are allowed).

data.name: StudentTerms.StudentCodeDuplicateInFile
data.value: This student code appears more than once in the file. Please remove duplicate rows before importing.

data.name: StudentTerms.StudentCodeAlreadyInTerm
data.value: A student with this code is already enrolled in the current term. Each student can only be enrolled once per term.

data.name: StudentTerms.StudentCodeInOtherTerm
data.value: This student is already enrolled in another term. Each student can only participate in one term at a time.

data.name: StudentTerms.EmailRequired
data.value: Email is required.

data.name: StudentTerms.EmailInvalid
data.value: Email format is invalid. Please enter a valid address in the format example@domain.com.

data.name: StudentTerms.EmailDuplicateInFile
data.value: This email appears more than once in the file. Please remove duplicate rows before importing.

data.name: StudentTerms.EmailAlreadyInTerm
data.value: A student with this email is already enrolled in the current term. Each email can only be enrolled once per term.

data.name: StudentTerms.EmailInOtherTerm
data.value: A student with this email is already enrolled in another term. Each student can only participate in one term at a time.

data.name: StudentTerms.PhoneInvalid
data.value: Phone number is invalid. Please enter a valid Vietnamese phone number (starting with 0, 10 digits).

data.name: StudentTerms.DateOfBirthInvalidFormat
data.value: Date of birth format is invalid (dd/MM/yyyy).

data.name: StudentTerms.DateOfBirthMinAge
data.value: Student must be at least 15 years old.

data.name: StudentTerms.SearchTermMaxLength
data.value: Search term must not exceed 100 characters.

data.name: StudentTerms.SortByAllowedValues
data.value: SortBy must be one of: {0}.

data.name: StudentTerms.SortOrderAllowedValues
data.value: SortOrder must be 'asc' or 'desc'.

data.name: StudentTerms.NotFound
data.value: Student term enrollment record not found. Please verify the ID or reload the page.

data.name: StudentTerms.TermNotOpen
data.value: This operation is not allowed. The term must be in Open status (not closed, not ended, and already started).

data.name: StudentTerms.TermEndedOrClosed
data.value: This operation cannot be performed because the term has already ended or been officially closed.

data.name: StudentTerms.CannotWithdrawPlacedViaUpdate
data.value: Cannot set enrollment status to Withdrawn while the student is placed. Please set placement status to Unplaced first.

data.name: StudentTerms.InvalidExcelHeaderDetail
data.value: Column {0} has an incorrect header. Expected: '{1}', found: '{2}'. Please use the provided template.

data.name: StudentTerms.InvalidExcelHeaderEmpty
data.value: (empty)

data.name: StudentTerms.EmailConflict
data.value: This email is already registered in the system. Each email can only be associated with one student account.

data.name: StudentTerms.StudentCodeConflict
data.value: This student code already exists in the system. Please verify or contact the administrator.

data.name: StudentTerms.AlreadyEnrolled
data.value: This student is already enrolled in the term. Each student can only be enrolled once per term.

data.name: StudentTerms.AlreadyWithdrawn
data.value: This student has already been withdrawn. To re-enroll, please use the Restore Enrollment function.

data.name: StudentTerms.NotWithdrawn
data.value: Cannot restore: this student has not been withdrawn from the term.

data.name: StudentTerms.CannotWithdrawPlaced
data.value: Cannot withdraw a student who is currently placed. Please set placement status to Unplaced first before withdrawing.

data.name: StudentTerms.EnterpriseIdRequiredWhenPlaced
data.value: An enterprise (EnterpriseId) must be specified when setting a student's placement status to Placed.

data.name: StudentTerms.EnterpriseNotFound
data.value: The specified enterprise was not found. Please verify the enterprise ID.

data.name: StudentTerms.AllStudentsPlaced
data.value: Bulk withdrawal failed: all selected students are currently placed. Please unplace them first.

data.name: StudentTerms.InvalidFileFormat
data.value: Only Excel XLSX files are supported.

data.name: StudentTerms.FileTooLarge
data.value: File must not exceed 5MB.

data.name: StudentTerms.InvalidExcelHeaders
data.value: Excel file has invalid headers. Please use the provided template.

data.name: StudentTerms.TooManyRows
data.value: File contains too many rows. Maximum 1000 rows per import.

data.name: StudentTerms.AddSuccess
data.value: Student has been successfully added to the term and is now pending placement assignment.

data.name: StudentTerms.UpdateSuccess
data.value: Student term enrollment updated successfully.

data.name: StudentTerms.WithdrawSuccess
data.value: Student has been successfully withdrawn from the term and their status has been updated to Withdrawn.

data.name: StudentTerms.RestoreSuccess
data.value: Enrollment has been successfully restored. The student is now Active in the term again.

data.name: StudentTerms.BulkWithdrawSuccess
data.value: Bulk withdrawal completed successfully. Students with an active placement (Placed) were automatically skipped and remain unaffected.

data.name: StudentTerms.ImportPreviewSuccess
data.value: File analysis complete. Please review the list below, check for any errors, and confirm to finalize the import.

data.name: StudentTerms.ImportConfirmSuccess
data.value: Students imported into the term successfully. All valid students have been enrolled and are ready to begin their internship.

data.name: StudentTerms.Log.Added
data.value: Student {0} added to term {1} by {2}.

data.name: StudentTerms.Log.Updated
data.value: Enrollment record {0} updated by {1}.

data.name: StudentTerms.Log.Withdrawn
data.value: Student {0} withdrawn from term by {1}.

data.name: StudentTerms.Log.Restored
data.value: Student {0} restored to term by {1}.

data.name: StudentTerms.Log.BulkWithdrawn
data.value: {0} students withdrawn from term {1} by {2}.

data.name: StudentTerms.Log.ImportConfirmed
data.value: {0} students imported into term {1} by {2}.

data.name: Terms.NotFound
data.value: Term not found. Please verify the ID or reload the page.

data.name: Terms.UniversityIdRequired
data.value: SuperAdmin must specify a UniversityId when creating a term.

data.name: Terms.NameRequired
data.value: Term name is required.

data.name: Terms.NameMaxLength
data.value: Term name cannot exceed 255 characters.

data.name: Terms.NameContainsDangerousCharacters
data.value: Term name contains disallowed characters. Please avoid using special characters such as < > & " ' ; or script-like content.

data.name: Terms.NameExists
data.value: Term name already exists. Please choose a different name.

data.name: Terms.StartDateRequired
data.value: Start date is required.

data.name: Terms.EndDateRequired
data.value: End date is required.

data.name: Terms.EndDateMustBeAfterStart
data.value: End date must be after start date.

data.name: Terms.StartDateInPast
data.value: Start date cannot be in the past.

data.name: Terms.StartDateMustBeOneWeekAhead
data.value: Start date cannot be today. Please select a date at least 1 week from now or a date before today.

data.name: Terms.InvalidDateFormat
data.value: Invalid date format. Please use dd/mm/yyyy format.

data.name: Terms.OverlapWithActiveTerm
data.value: This time period overlaps with term [{0}].

data.name: Terms.CreateSuccess
data.value: The term has been created successfully and is currently in Draft status. You can update details and open the term when ready.

data.name: Terms.UpdateSuccess
data.value: Term updated successfully.

data.name: Terms.CloseSuccess
data.value: Term [{0}] has been closed successfully.

data.name: Terms.DeleteSuccess
data.value: Term deleted successfully.

data.name: Terms.OnlyActiveCanBeClosed
data.value: Only Active or Ended terms (still open status) can be closed.

data.name: Terms.OnlyUpcomingCanBeDeleted
data.value: Cannot delete active, ended, or closed terms. Please use Close Term feature if needed.

data.name: Terms.VersionConflict
data.value: This term has been updated by someone else. Please reload the page to see the latest information before editing.

data.name: Terms.StatusChanged
data.value: Cannot delete this term because its status has changed. Please reload the page to see the latest information.

data.name: Terms.AlreadyDeleted
data.value: This term has already been deleted. Please reload the page.

data.name: Terms.UnplacedStudentsWarning
data.value: There are {0} students without company assignments in this term. Are you sure you want to close it?

data.name: Terms.HasRelatedData
data.value: Warning: This term has related data (enrolled students, internship groups, or evaluation cycles). Please handle related data before deleting.

data.name: Terms.StartDateLocked
data.value: The start date cannot be changed because the term has already begun. Only the end date and other details can still be edited.

data.name: Terms.YearInvalidRange
data.value: Year must be between 2000 and 2100.

data.name: Terms.CloseReasonRequired
data.value: Close reason is required.

data.name: Terms.CloseReasonMinLength
data.value: Close reason must be at least 10 characters long.

data.name: Terms.CloseReasonMaxLength
data.value: Close reason cannot exceed 500 characters.

data.name: Terms.Log.TermCreated
data.value: Term {0} created successfully by user {1}

data.name: Terms.Log.TermUpdated
data.value: Term {0} updated successfully by user {1}

data.name: Terms.Log.TermClosed
data.value: Term {0} closed by user {1}

data.name: Terms.Log.TermDeleted
data.value: Term {0} soft-deleted by user {1}

data.name: Terms.Log.TermsRetrieved
data.value: Retrieved {0} terms for university {1}

data.name: Terms.Log.UserNotAssociatedWithUniversity
data.value: User {0} is not associated with any university

data.name: Terms.Log.TermNotFound
data.value: Term {0} not found

data.name: Terms.Log.TermNotFoundOrAccessDenied
data.value: Term {0} not found or access denied for user {1}

data.name: Terms.Log.VersionConflict
data.value: Version conflict for term {0}

data.name: Terms.Log.VersionConflictDetailed
data.value: Version conflict for term {0}. Expected: {1}, Got: {2}

data.name: Terms.Log.DuplicateTermName
data.value: Duplicate term name detected: {0}

data.name: Terms.Log.ConcurrencyConflictUpdating
data.value: Concurrency conflict updating term {0}

data.name: Terms.Log.ConcurrencyConflictClosing
data.value: Concurrency conflict closing term {0}

data.name: Terms.Log.ErrorCreatingTerm
data.value: Error creating term

data.name: Terms.Log.ErrorUpdatingTerm
data.value: Error updating term {0}

data.name: Terms.Log.ErrorClosingTerm
data.value: Error closing term {0}

data.name: Terms.Log.ErrorDeletingTerm
data.value: Error deleting term {0}

data.name: Terms.Log.ErrorRetrievingTerms
data.value: Error retrieving terms

data.name: Terms.Log.ErrorRetrievingTerm
data.value: Error retrieving term {0}

data.name: Enterprise.GetEnterprisesError
data.value: Error while retrieving enterprises

data.name: Enterprise.GetEnterpriseByIdError
data.value: Error occurred while getting enterprise by id

data.name: Enterprise.EnterpriseWithSameTaxCodeExists
data.value: The tax identification number already exists in the system.

data.name: Enterprise.LogEnterpriseWithSameTaxCodeExists
data.value: The business with tax code '{TaxCode}' already exists.

data.name: Enterprise.ErrorCreatingEnterprise
data.value: An error occurred while creating the business.

data.name: Enterprise.InvalidTaxCodeFormat
data.value: The tax identification number is not in the correct format.

data.name: Enterprise.NameNotEmpty
data.value: Name is required.

data.name: Enterprise.NameMaxLength
data.value: Name must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: Enterprise.WebsiteNotValid
data.value: Website must start with http or https.

data.name: Enterprise.LogoUrlNotValid
data.value: LogoUrl must start with http or https.

data.name: Enterprise.BackgroundUrlNotValid
data.value: BackgroundUrl must start with http or https.

data.name: Enterprise.UpdatePermissionsNotAllowed
data.value: You are not allowed to modify this enterprise.

data.name: Enterprise.LogUpdatePermissionsNotAllowed
data.value: Error: No permission to edit enterprise {enterpriseId}.

data.name: Enterprise.LogNotFound
data.value: Enterprise {enterpriseId} not found

data.name: Enterprise.UpdateTaxCodeNotAllowed
data.value: Updating the tax code is not allowed.

data.name: Enterprise.LogDeleteError
data.value: Error occurred while deleting enterprise with ID {EnterpriseId}

data.name: Enterprise.DeleteError
data.value: An error occurred while deleting the enterprise. Please try again later.

data.name: Enterprise.HR.NotAssociatedWithEnterprise
data.value: You are not associated with any enterprise as an HR.

data.name: Enterprise.NotFoundCurrentHR
data.value: Enterprise not found for the current HR.

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogCreationFailed
data.value: Failed to save internship group to database

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogCreationError
data.value: Error occurred while creating internship group

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogUpdateFailed
data.value: Failed to update internship group in database

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogUpdateError
data.value: Error occurred while updating internship group

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogDeleteFailed
data.value: Failed to delete internship group from database

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogDeleteError
data.value: Error occurred while deleting internship group: {InternshipId}

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogInvalidStudentIds
data.value: Some student IDs are invalid or not found

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogAddStudentsFailed
data.value: Failed to update group members in database

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogAddStudentsError
data.value: Error occurred while adding students to group

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogRemoveStudentsFailed
data.value: Failed to update group in database

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogRemoveStudentsError
data.value: Error occurred while removing students from group

data.name: InternshipGroup.InvalidStudentId
data.value: Invalid student ID.

data.name: InternshipGroup.TermNotFound
data.value: Term not found.

data.name: InternshipGroup.TermNotActive
data.value: The term is not currently active. Internship groups can only be created in an active term.

data.name: InternshipGroup.EnterpriseNotFound
data.value: Enterprise not found.

data.name: InternshipGroup.MentorNotFound
data.value: Mentor not found.

data.name: InternshipGroup.StudentNotFound
data.value: Student not found.

data.name: InternshipGroup.NotFound
data.value: Internship group not found.

data.name: InternshipGroup.HasStudents
data.value: Cannot delete a group that still has students. Please move all students to another group first.

data.name: InternshipGroup.EnterpriseUserNotFound
data.value: Enterprise user record not found for the current user.

data.name: InternshipGroup.StudentNotApproved
data.value: Student {0} does not have an approved application for this enterprise.

data.name: InternshipGroup.AtLeastOneStudentRequired
data.value: The internship group must have at least 1 student.

data.name: InternshipGroup.StudentAlreadyInActiveGroup
data.value: Student is already in another active group in this term.

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogStudentNotApproved
data.value: Student {0} does not have an approved application for enterprise {1}

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogTermNotFound
data.value: Term not found for ID: {TermId}

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogEnterpriseNotFound
data.value: Enterprise not found for ID: {EnterpriseId}

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogMentorNotFound
data.value: Mentor not found for ID: {MentorId}

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogStudentNotFound
data.value: Student not found for ID: {StudentId}

data.name: InternshipGroup.LogNotFound
data.value: Internship group not found for ID: {InternshipId}

data.name: Logbooks.StudentNotFound
data.value: Student record not found for logged in user. Ensure you are logged in with a Student account.

data.name: Logbooks.UpdateForbidden
data.value: You do not have permission to update this logbook.

data.name: Logbooks.DeleteForbidden
data.value: You do not have permission to delete this logbook.

data.name: Logbooks.InvalidInternship
data.value: Internship group not found.

data.name: EvaluationCycle.NotFound
data.value: Evaluation cycle not found.

data.name: EvaluationCycle.TermNotFound
data.value: Corresponding term not found.

data.name: EvaluationCycle.NameRequired
data.value: Evaluation cycle name is required.

data.name: EvaluationCycle.StartDateRequired
data.value: Start date is required.

data.name: EvaluationCycle.EndDateRequired
data.value: End date is required.

data.name: EvaluationCycle.EndDateMustBeAfterStart
data.value: End date must be after start date.

data.name: EvaluationCycle.CannotDeleteWithCriteria
data.value: Evaluation cycles with criteria cannot be deleted.

data.name: EvaluationCycle.CannotUpdateCompleted
data.value: Cannot update a completed evaluation cycle.

data.name: EvaluationCycle.AlreadyCompleted
data.value: This evaluation cycle has already been completed or cancelled.

data.name: EvaluationCycle.CannotCompleteWithoutCriteria
data.value: Cannot complete an evaluation cycle without any criteria.

data.name: EvaluationCriteria.NotFound
data.value: Evaluation criteria not found.

data.name: EvaluationCriteria.CycleNotFound
data.value: Corresponding evaluation cycle not found.

data.name: EvaluationCriteria.CannotCreateInCompletedCycle
data.value: Cannot add new criteria to an already completed evaluation cycle.

data.name: EvaluationCriteria.CannotUpdateInCompletedCycle
data.value: Cannot update criteria in an already completed evaluation cycle.

data.name: EvaluationCriteria.CannotDeleteInCompletedCycle
data.value: Cannot delete criteria in an already completed evaluation cycle.

data.name: Evaluation.NotFound
data.value: Evaluation results not found.

data.name: Evaluation.CycleNotFound
data.value: Corresponding evaluation cycle not found.

data.name: Evaluation.InternshipNotFound
data.value: Internship group not found.

data.name: Evaluation.CannotUpdateSubmitted
data.value: Cannot update an evaluation once the results is submitted or published.

data.name: Evaluation.CriteriaNotFound
data.value: Some evaluation criteria are missing.

data.name: Evaluation.ScoreExceedsMax
data.value: Given score cannot exceed the maximum score of its respective criteria.

data.name: Evaluation.AlreadySubmitted
data.value: All members in this group have been fully submitted.

data.name: Evaluation.CannotPublishIfNotSubmitted
data.value: Cannot publish the scores unless all students in the internship group are marked as "Submitted".

data.name: Evaluation.CannotSaveInCompletedCycle
data.value: Cannot draft evaluation scores in an already completed evaluation cycle.

data.name: Evaluation.CannotUpdateInCompletedCycle
data.value: Cannot update evaluation scores in an already completed evaluation cycle.

data.name: Evaluation.CannotSubmitInCompletedCycle
data.value: Cannot submit evaluation scores in an already completed evaluation cycle.

data.name: Evaluation.CannotPublishInCompletedCycle
data.value: Cannot publish evaluation scores in an already completed evaluation cycle.

data.name: InternshipApplication.ApplicationIdRequired
data.value: Application ID is required.

data.name: InternshipApplication.MentorIdRequired
data.value: Mentor ID is required.

data.name: InternshipApplication.RejectReasonRequired
data.value: Rejection reason is required.

data.name: InternshipApplication.RejectReasonMaxLength
data.value: Rejection reason cannot exceed 500 characters.

data.name: InternshipApplication.ProjectNameRequired
data.value: Project name is required.

data.name: InternshipApplication.ProjectNameMaxLength
data.value: Project name cannot exceed 255 characters.

data.name: InternshipApplication.ProjectDescriptionMaxLength
data.value: Project description cannot exceed 1000 characters.

data.name: InternshipApplication.NotFound
data.value: Application not found.

data.name: InternshipApplication.EnterpriseUserNotFound
data.value: Enterprise user record not found for the current user.

data.name: InternshipApplication.MentorNotBelongToEnterprise
data.value: The selected mentor does not belong to your enterprise.

data.name: InternshipApplication.StatusMustBePendingToAccept
data.value: Only applications with Pending status can be accepted.

data.name: InternshipApplication.StatusMustBePendingToReject
data.value: Only applications with Pending status can be rejected.

data.name: InternshipApplication.StatusMustBeApprovedToAssign
data.value: A mentor can only be assigned to an Approved application.

data.name: InternshipApplication.StudentAlreadyInGroup
data.value: The student has already been assigned to an internship group in this term.

data.name: InternshipApplication.StudentNotInMentorGroup
data.value: The student is not in your group. Please contact HR to assign a mentor first.

data.name: InternshipApplication.ProjectNameExistsInGroup
data.value: A project with this name already exists in the group.

data.name: InternshipApplication.Log.Accepting
data.value: Accepting application {0}

data.name: InternshipApplication.Log.AcceptSuccess
data.value: Application {0} accepted successfully

data.name: InternshipApplication.Log.AcceptError
data.value: Error accepting application {0}

data.name: InternshipApplication.Log.Rejecting
data.value: Rejecting application {0}

data.name: InternshipApplication.Log.RejectSuccess
data.value: Application {0} rejected successfully

data.name: InternshipApplication.Log.RejectError
data.value: Error rejecting application {0}

data.name: InternshipApplication.Log.AssigningMentor
data.value: Assigning mentor for application {0}

data.name: InternshipApplication.Log.AssignMentorSuccess
data.value: Mentor assigned successfully for application {0}

data.name: InternshipApplication.Log.AssignMentorError
data.value: Error assigning mentor for application {0}

data.name: InternshipApplication.Log.AssigningProject
data.value: Assigning project for application {0}

data.name: InternshipApplication.Log.AssignProjectSuccess
data.value: Project assigned successfully for application {0}, project: {1}

data.name: InternshipApplication.Log.AssignProjectError
data.value: Error assigning project for application {0}

data.name: InternshipApplication.Log.InvalidUserId
data.value: Current user identity is missing or invalid

data.name: Password.NotEmpty
data.value: Password cannot be empty.

data.name: CannotIdentifyManager
data.value: Cannot identify the manager performing the reset.

data.name: OnlyManagerCanReset
data.value: Only managers are allowed to reset passwords.

data.name: OnlyActiveEmployeeCanReset
data.value: Password can only be reset for active accounts.

data.name: ResetPassword.EmployeeIdRequired
data.value: Employee ID is required.

data.name: ResetStatusNoEmail
data.value: Password reset successful. However, the email could not be sent.

data.name: Employee.CannotUpdateInactive
data.value: Cannot update information for inactive employees.

data.name: Profile.EmployeeIdRequired
data.value: EmployeeId cannot be empty.

data.name: Profile.FullNameRequired
data.value: Full name cannot be empty.

data.name: Profile.FullNameMaxLength
data.value: Full name cannot exceed 100 characters.

data.name: Profile.EmailRequired
data.value: Email cannot be empty.

data.name: Profile.EmailInvalid
data.value: Invalid email format.

data.name: Profile.PhoneRequired
data.value: Phone number cannot be empty.

data.name: Profile.PhoneInvalid
data.value: Invalid phone number format.

data.name: Employee.CodeInvalidFormat
data.value: Employee Code must start with W, C, B, or M followed by 6 digits (e.g., M000001).

data.name: Auth.TokenRequired
data.value: Token is required.

data.name: Auth.NewPasswordRequired
data.value: New password is required.

data.name: Auth.ConfirmPasswordRequired
data.value: Confirm password is required.

data.name: Auth.ConfirmPasswordMismatch
data.value: Confirm password does not match new password.

data.name: Auth.EmployeeCodeRequired
data.value: Employee code is required.

data.name: Auth.PasswordResetGenericMessage
data.value: If an account exists for that employee code, a reset email has been sent.

data.name: EmployeeNotActive
data.value: Employee is not active.

data.name: CannotPromoteToManager
data.value: Cannot promote to Manager directly.

data.name: NewRoleMustBeDifferent
data.value: New role must be different from current role.

data.name: DatabaseUpdateError
data.value: An error occurred while updating the database.

data.name: RoleChangedButEmailFailed
data.value: Role changed successfully for {0}, but notification email failed to send.

data.name: Enterprise.LogRestoreFailed
data.value: Failed to restore enterprise. EnterpriseId: {EnterpriseId}

data.name: Enterprise.RestoreFailed
data.value: Failed to restore enterprise.

data.name: InternshipGroup.MustBelongToYourEnterprise
data.value: The group must belong to your enterprise.

data.name: InternshipGroup.MustBeInSameTerm
data.value: The groups must belong to the same internship term.

data.name: InternshipGroup.MustBeActive
data.value: Action can only be performed on active groups.

data.name: InternshipGroup.StudentsNotInSourceGroup
data.value: One or more students are not in the source group.

data.name: InternshipGroup.GroupAlreadyArchived
data.value: The group has already been archived.

data.name: InternshipGroups.CannotArchiveNoData
data.value: Archiving is not supported for groups without activity data.

data.name: InternshipGroup.HasActivityData
data.value: The group has existing activity data (logbooks, evaluations, violations, or projects with content) and cannot be deleted. Please use the Archive function to preserve history.

data.name: InternshipGroup.GroupNotActive
data.value: Only Active groups can be deleted. Finished or Archived groups cannot be deleted.

data.name: ViolationReport.GetViolationReportsError
data.value: Error getting violation reports

data.name: ViolationReport.CreateViolationReportError
data.value: An error occurred while generating the violation report.

data.name: ViolationReport.ErrorOccurredWhileDeletingViolationReport
data.value: An error occurred while deleting violation report {0}.

data.name: ViolationReport.ErrorOccurredWhileUpdatingViolationReport
data.value: An error occurred while updating the report. Please try again.

data.name: ViolationReport.ErrorWhileGettingViolationReportDetail
data.value: An error occurred while retrieving violation report details.

data.name: ActiveTerms.InvalidUserId
data.value: Your session is invalid. Please sign out and sign in again.

data.name: ActiveTerms.EnterpriseUserNotFound
data.value: Your enterprise employee profile was not found. Please contact the administrator to verify your account.

data.name: ActiveTerms.NoActiveTermsFoundForEnterprise
data.value: Your enterprise currently has no active internship groups in any ongoing term.

data.name: ActiveTerms.NoActiveTermsFoundForMentor
data.value: You have not been assigned to any active internship group in the current term.

data.name: ActiveTerms.SystemError
data.value: An error occurred while loading the active internship terms. Please try again later.

data.name: ActiveTerms.Log.Retrieved
data.value: Retrieved {0} active terms for enterprise {1} (isMentor={2})

data.name: ActiveTerms.Log.Error
data.value: Error retrieving active terms for enterprise user {0}

data.name: Projects.MentorNotFound
data.value: Mentor information not found in the system.

data.name: Projects.GroupNotActiveForCreate
data.value: Cannot create a project for an archived or finished group.

data.name: Projects.GroupNotActiveForPublish
data.value: Cannot publish a project for an archived or finished group.

data.name: Projects.GroupNotActiveForUpdate
data.value: Cannot update a project in an archived or finished group.

data.name: Projects.InvalidStatusForPublish
data.value: Only Draft projects can be published.

data.name: Projects.InvalidStatusForComplete
data.value: Only Published projects can be marked as completed.

data.name: Projects.InvalidStatusForUpdate
data.value: Cannot update a project that is Completed or Archived.

data.name: Projects.CannotDeleteWithActiveAssignments
data.value: Cannot delete a project that has active student assignments.

data.name: Projects.ProjectCodeConflict
data.value: Unable to generate a unique project code. Please try again.

data.name: Projects.FieldRequired
data.value: Project field is required.

data.name: Projects.RequirementsRequired
data.value: Project requirements are required.

data.name: Projects.FieldMaxLength
data.value: Project field must not exceed 100 characters.

data.name: Projects.RequirementsMaxLength
data.value: Project requirements must not exceed 2000 characters.

data.name: Projects.DeliverablesMaxLength
data.value: Project deliverables must not exceed 2000 characters.

data.name: InternshipGroup.GroupNotActive
data.value: Group is no longer active (Finished or Archived).

data.name: Projects.NoGroupAssigned
data.value: Project has no internship group assigned and cannot be published.

data.name: Projects.GroupIsFinished
data.value: The internship group has finished and the project cannot be published.

data.name: Projects.CannotDeleteHasData
data.value: Cannot delete project that already has data (work items or sprints).

data.name: InternshipGroups.CannotDeleteNotActive
data.value: Only Active internship groups can be deleted.
